company_summary: Rubrik is a cybersecurity company focused on cyber resilience — protecting enterprise data and identity against ransomware and breaches through zero-trust, immutable backups, threat analytics, and identity security. They recently IPO'd and are aggressively expanding their platform with AI capabilities including a Ruby AI Agent and multi-IdP identity recovery. Their trajectory is toward becoming a unified cyber resilience platform spanning on-premises, cloud, and SaaS environments.
fit_indicators: Rubrik has a dedicated Okta Backup & Recovery product and multi-IdP identity security focus — Sudheer implemented OKTA authentication in enterprise systems at RNTBCI, giving him direct product-domain familiarity

Rubrik is building AI-native features including a Ruby AI Agent — Sudheer is actively building multi-agent AI systems using Claude API, directly relevant to understanding and shaping AI product direction

Rubrik's platform spans legacy on-premises (SQL Server, IBM Db2, VMware) and modern cloud environments — Sudheer's 4 years of legacy modernisation and microservices work at RNTBCI mirrors this hybrid architecture challenge

Rubrik targets large enterprise customers across healthcare, financial services, and government — Sudheer built internal tooling used across Nissan/Renault/Mitsubishi operations at enterprise scale, demonstrating enterprise product sensibility

contact_targets.title: Senior Product Manager, Identity Security or AI Products
contact_targets.reason: Closest peer to the target role; would know team headcount, roadmap priorities, and what background they are hiring for

contact_targets.title: Senior Software Engineer or Staff Engineer, Platform or AI
contact_targets.reason: Would understand the technical depth required and can speak to the stack and product challenges Sudheer would be working on

contact_targets.title: Technical Recruiter, Product or Engineering
contact_targets.reason: Fallback if no PM or IC contact is reachable; can route to the right hiring manager
